personas.research_text: Alex Reid joined Northstar Labs as VP Sales in 2024 to build the direct sales motion. The company previously relied on channel partners. Reid is hiring 8 AEs in H1 2026 and needs outbound tooling that scales without adding SDR headcount.

Priya Nair leads people operations at Northstar Labs, which grew from 120 to 340 employees in 2025. She manages payroll across 3 countries and is evaluating HRIS consolidation to replace a patchwork of point solutions. Onboarding cycle time is a current pain point.

Devon Okafor oversees engineering and AI infrastructure at Northstar Labs. The team is evaluating foundation model providers for internal tooling. They ran a pilot with one provider in Q4 2025 and are benchmarking alternatives on latency, context window, and safety controls.
